title: Trash to Treasure
description: Whenever you create a Status, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] random Orb.
smart_description: Whenever you create a Status, [gold]Channel[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] random Orb.
notes: Counter power that stacks - each stack channels an additional orb per Status created. Smart description shows plural form when stacks exceed 1.
